title: Signal Ledger Card
prompt:
Create a production-ready Signal Ledger Card using TypeScript React, Tailwind CSS, and Framer Motion. This original card summarizes a decision signal in a three-row ledger. A reader selects Show evidence to expand the final row into two concise, attributable notes; selecting it again closes the evidence. The card should visibly distinguish the stable summary from the expanded evidence without relying solely on color. Use a light Bento system: #F4F5F6 stage, white card, #ECECEE hairline border, 22px corners, soft neutral shadow, #111111 type, and #4A4A4F supporting copy. Cyan is the only bright accent, and the card must use solid fills rather than gradients.

Use semantic article content, a native 44px button, aria-expanded, aria-controls, and an aria-live polite update. Enter and Space must work through the native control. Reveal the evidence area with opacity and height using a spring at stiffness 310 and damping 29; rotate the disclosure mark over 180ms ease-out. Local component state must be deterministic: do not use timers, random values, storage, remote assets, network requests, or external data. Use opacity and transforms wherever possible.

At 320px, ledger rows must stack their label and value without clipping; in the large preview, allow the card to use a wider maximum width. Maintain logical tab order, visible 3px focus treatment, AA contrast, and written state labels. Under prefers-reduced-motion, reveal immediately with a 120ms opacity fade. Return complete client code plus a runnable CSS-only approximation and suggested HTML.

code.css:
/* HTML:
Evidence notes
*/ .signal-ledger{max-width:340px;padding:20px;border:1px solid #ececee;border-radius:22px;background:#fff}.signal-ledger button{min-height:44px;width:100%;border:0;border-radius:12px;background:#f4f5f6;color:#111;font-weight:800}.signal-ledger button:focus-visible{outline:3px solid #111;outline-offset:3px}.signal-ledger button[aria-expanded=true]+div{display:block;margin-top:12px;border-left:2px solid #53e8d4;padding-left:12px;color:#4a4a4f}@media(prefers-reduced-motion:reduce){.signal-ledger *{transition:none}}

demoCode:
(() => {function Demo(){const [open,setOpen]=React.useState(false);return
SIGNAL LEDGER

Review signal: clear

Confidence High
Owner Mina
{open&&Two reviewers agreed.
Rollback remains documented.}

{open?'Evidence is visible.':'Evidence is hidden.'}

}return ;})()
